message:
chore(beads): add test coverage & E2E integration epic (20 beads)

Coverage audit found 27 src/ modules >100 LOC with zero unit tests,
6 integration test stubs with zero tests, and no comprehensive E2E
scripts with detailed logging. Created granular task graph:

- 10 unit test tasks covering all untested modules
- 1 integration test stub task (6 files)
- 1 E2E logging framework enhancement (prerequisite)
- 7 E2E integration test tasks (HTTP, gRPC, runtime, cancellation,
  multi-protocol, distributed, database)

Dependency structure ensures E2E logging framework completes before
E2E test implementation begins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
